name: ExtensionMolecularSequence_Relative_StartingSequence_Chromosome
title: R5: Chromosome Identifier
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MolecularSequence.relative.startingSequence.chromosome` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MolecularSequence.relative.startingSequence.chromosome` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MolecularSequence.relative.startingSequence.chromosome` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `MolecularSequence.referenceSeq.chromosome` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4: `MolecularSequence.referenceSeq.chromosome` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MolecularSequence.relative.startingSequence.chromosome` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MolecularSequence.referenceSeq.chromosome` as `Equivalent`.

element.comment: Element `MolecularSequence.relative.startingSequence.chromosome` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MolecularSequence.referenceSeq.chromosome` as `Equivalent`.

element.definition: Structural unit composed of a nucleic acid molecule which controls its own replication through the interaction of specific proteins at one or more origins of replication ([SO:0000340](http://www.sequenceontology.org/browser/current_svn/term/SO:0000340)).
